faqItems.a: BidAgent is an AI-powered platform for bidding on multilateral development bank projects (ADB, World Bank, etc.). It helps you analyze tender documents, develop bidding strategies, guide proposal writing, and conduct quality reviews.

BidAgent does not directly generate proposal documents. Instead, our AI guides you through interactive Q&A to write high-quality proposals step by step according to tender requirements. This ensures content accuracy and originality while leveraging AI analysis and strategy.
Currently supports Asian Development Bank (ADB) and World Bank (WB) consulting service project bids. We are continuously adding support for more institutions.

Different features consume different credits: Document analysis ~50 credits/time, AI guidance ~20 credits/time, Full quality review ~100 credits/time. New users receive free trial credits upon registration.
Register → Browse opportunities → Create a bid project → Upload tender documents → Use AI analysis and guidance features. The entire process is intuitive with AI assistant guidance throughout.

All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. Your uploaded tender documents are only used for current project analysis and never shared with others. We follow strict data security and privacy protection standards.
You can reach our support team at support@bidagent.ai. Response time during business hours is typically within 24 hours.

landing.painPointsTitle: Why Is Traditional Bidding So Difficult?

painPoints.title: 2-4 Weeks Per Bid
painPoints.desc: Proposal writing typically takes 2-4 weeks, with much time spent understanding documents and formatting

painPoints.title: Complex Format Rules
painPoints.desc: ADB/WB each have different format specifications — one mistake can lead to disqualification

painPoints.title: High Rejection Risk
painPoints.desc: Over 30% of bids are rejected due to non-compliance or missing content

painPoints.title: Scattered Information
painPoints.desc: Tender information spread across platforms, easy to miss quality opportunities

painPoints.title: Knowledge Silos
painPoints.desc: Experience depends on senior staff — knowledge is lost when people leave

painPoints.title: Collaboration Gaps
painPoints.desc: Inefficient communication between bid managers and writers, chaotic version control

landingFaqs.q: Which multilateral institutions does BidAgent support?
landingFaqs.a: Currently supports ADB (Asian Development Bank) and World Bank (WB), with more institutions being added continuously.

No. BidAgent's AI serves as a professional bid advisor, guiding you to write proposals according to tender requirements and specifications. AI provides format requirements, key points, scoring alignment suggestions, and draft reviews, but the final document is written by you to ensure content is authentic, accurate, and reflects your company's actual capabilities.
JWT encrypted authentication, file SHA256 deduplication, encrypted database storage, CORS whitelist. Your tender documents and bid content are never used to train AI models.
Supports PDF and DOCX formats, including scanned document OCR. After upload, AI automatically parses document structure, identifies sections, and builds vector indexes.
Project creation 10 credits, AI analysis by token usage, writing guidance 20-100 credits/time, quality review 50-200 credits/time. Free users get 100 credits.
V2 supports single-user mode. Team collaboration is planned for V3, which will include multi-role collaboration, review workflows, and version management.
